005/***************************************************************/
006package com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.shooter;
007
008import static edu.wpi.first.units.Units.RPM;
009
010import java.util.function.DoubleSupplier;
011
012import com.ctre.phoenix6.hardware.TalonFX;
013import com.stuypulse.robot.Robot;
014import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Settings;
015
016import dev.doglog.DogLog;
017import edu.wpi.first.units.measure.AngularVelocity;
018import edu.wpi.first.units.measure.Voltage;
019import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.SubsystemBase;
020import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.sysid.SysIdRoutine;
021
022public abstract class Shooter extends SubsystemBase {
023
024    private static final Shooter instance;
025
026    private ShooterState state;
027
028    static {
029        if (Robot.isReal()) {
030            instance = new ShooterImpl();
031        } else {
032            instance = new ShooterSim();
033        }
034    }
035
036    public static Shooter getInstance() {
037        return instance;
038    }
039
040    protected Shooter() {
041        setState(ShooterState.SHOOT);
042    }
043
044    public void setState(ShooterState state) {
045        this.state = state;
046    }
047
048    public ShooterState getState() {
049        return this.state;
050    }
051
052    public void logMotor(String motorName, TalonFX motor) {
053        String stem = "Shooter/Motors/" + motorName + "/";
054        DogLog.log(stem + "MotorVoltage", motor.getMotorVoltage().getValueAsDouble());
055        DogLog.log(stem + "SupplyCurrent", motor.getSupplyCurrent().getValueAsDouble());
056        DogLog.log(stem + "StatorCurrent", motor.getStatorCurrent().getValueAsDouble());
057        DogLog.log(stem + "RPM", motor.getVelocity().getValue().in(RPM));
058    }
059
060    /** Enum representing the different possible states of the shooter. */
061    public enum ShooterState {
062
063        // SOTM(() -> 0.0), 
064        // FOTM(() -> 0.0),
065        /** Shooter doesn't run. */
066        IDLE(() -> 0.0),
067        /** Shooter wheels spin at it's target RPM, interpolated based on distance to hub. */
068        SHOOT(Settings.Shooter.SHOOT_TUNING_RPM), //TODO:Replace with interpolated RPM after data is gathered
069        /** Shooter wheels spin at it's target RPM, interpolated based on distance to ferry zone. */
070        FERRY(Settings.Shooter.FERRY_TUNING_RPM),
071        // SHOOT(() -> InterpolationCalculator.interpolateShotInfo().targetRPM()),
072        // FERRY(() -> InterpolationCalculator.interpolateFerryingInfo().targetRPM()),
073        /** Shooter wheels spin at a predetermined constant rate without interpolation. */
074        MANUAL_HUB(Settings.Shooter.MANUAL_HUB_RPM);
075
076        /** The supplier for the target RPM of the shooter in the corresponding state. */
077        private DoubleSupplier RPMSupplier;
078
079        /**
080         * Constructs a ShooterState with the given supplier for the target RPM of the shooter.
081         * @param RPMSupplier the supplier for the target RPM of the shooter in the corresponding state
082         */
083        private ShooterState(DoubleSupplier RPMSupplier) {
084            this.RPMSupplier = RPMSupplier;
085        }
086
087        /**
088         * Gets the target angular velocity of the shooter in the corresponding state by converting the target RPM from the supplier to an AngularVelocity.
089         * @return the target angular velocity of the shooter
090         */
091        public AngularVelocity getTargetAngularVelocity() {
092            return RPM.of(RPMSupplier.getAsDouble());
093        }
094    }
095
096    public abstract AngularVelocity getCurrentAngularVelocity();
097
098    protected abstract void stopMotors();
099
100    public abstract SysIdRoutine getShooterSysIdRoutine();
101
102    public abstract void setVoltageOverride(Voltage voltage);
103
104    public boolean shooterSpunUp() {
105        return getCurrentAngularVelocity().gte(getState().getTargetAngularVelocity().minus(RPM.of(100)));
106    }
107
108    @Override
109    public void periodic() {
110        final ShooterState currentState = getState();
111        DogLog.log("Shooter/Target RPM", currentState.getTargetAngularVelocity().in(RPM));
112        DogLog.log("Shooter/State", currentState.name());
113        DogLog.forceNt.log("States/Shooter", currentState.name());
114        DogLog.forceNt.log("Shooter/At Target RPM", shooterSpunUp());
115    }
116}
